ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Official name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the team represents */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Bowler, Batsman) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style (e.g., right-hand bat, left-hand bat) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style (e.g., right-arm fast, left-arm spinner) */,
  "playing_status" TEXT /* Current playing status (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player relevant to these statistics */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match in which the statistics were recorded */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Total balls faced by the player */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Total catches made by the player */,
  "run_outs" INTEGER /* Total run-outs by the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Batting strike rate */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Bowling economy rate */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Extras conceded by the player (e.g., wides, no-balls) */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., international, domestic) */,
  "floodlights" INTEGER /* Whether the venue has floodlights */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface (e.g., grass, artificial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_types" (
  "match_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match type */,
  "match_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the match type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the match type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_statistics" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team relevant to these statistics */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played recently */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in recent matches */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in recent matches */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws in recent matches */,
  "form_period" TEXT /* Period over which the form statistics are calculated (e.g., last 6 months, last year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, fan, coach) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)
